word: G2341 - θηριομαχέω - thēriomachéō - thay-ree-om-akh-eh'-o - Fight with wild beasts

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Fight with wild beasts
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a compound of G2342 and G3164; to be a beast fighter (in the gladiatorial show), that is, (figuratively) to encounter (furious men): - fight with wild beasts.
